title: California Assembly Passes Bill Bolstering the Sale of E15 Gasoline Blends
content: On October 1st, the California State Assembly passed Bill ABX2-9, permitting the sale of E15 gasoline blends within the State. The Bill will now await approval and consideration in the Californian Senate. The move is part of an effort to support gasoline production in the State as promoted by the 2024 CEC Transportation Fuels Assessment. The Bill was introduced for consideration by Assemblywoman Cottie Petri-Norris. The California Air Resources Board (CARB) is expected to present solutions to bolster gasoline production in the State by 1st July 2025. The Bill proposes the application of a fee by the CARB on the production of E10 to E15, which would be capped at a total of $5,000,000 for a period of three years.
author: Analysts Account
